Why are we spending hundreds of billions of dollars, and theyre not there for us? Trump said. Weve always been there for them.

articles.title: Original Switch console lineup to be discontinued in Europe by mid-February 2027 - GamesIndustry.biz
articles.description: To comply with replaceable battery legislation, Nintendo will begin rolling out revised Switch 2 models this summer
articles.content:
Nintendo will discontinue sales of the original Switch lineup in Europe from mid-February 2027, as required by EU legislation on accessible consumer hardware batteries.
